Projects

A collection of my personal projects and what I'm working on.

01

Personal Homepage

Node Express Pug Tailwind CSS

The site you are currently on. Information about me and my projects.

GitHub
02

PolePick

Node Express Handlebars Tailwind CSS

Predict the next Formula 1 race outcome and compete with others.

Live Demo
03

Woodcutters

React Node Sockets SQLite Bootstrap

A simulation game about deforestation for the political education of young people.

Live Demo GitHub
04

Tournament Tracker

Node Express EJS SQLite Cheerio

Summarize and present upcoming esports tournaments.

Live Demo
05

Amronas

Symfony MySQL Twig Docker

Manage and share movie lists, play Wordle against each other, a "Deutsche Bahn" travel bingo, etc.

Live Demo GitHub
